next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asks (German) amount earned since beginning of Nov 2025 for service line 'follow-up  timeline prototype review', answer only a number. I searched invoices for exact and normalized spacing variant; found 5 matches and read all 5 files. Date filter is issued_on >= 2025-11-01; all five qualify (2025-11-04, 2025-12-02, 2025-12-30, 2026-02-14, 2026-03-26). Arithmetic from line_eur values for matching line item: 240+480+240+240+240=1440. Completeness check passed: search total_matches=5 and all five read.
